zh.lifeSummary: 當Dea. William Carpenter於1631年11月22日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾沙爾布恩時，他的父親William Carpenter27歲，母親Abigail Briant27歲。他於1651年10月5日與Priscilla Bennett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1702年1月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯紐曼 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dea. William Carpenter于1631年11月22日出生在英国英格兰維爾爾沙爾布恩时，他的父亲William Carpenter27岁，母亲Abigail Briant27岁。他于1651年10月5日与Priscilla Bennett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1702年1月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯紐曼 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams
Parent History: 1643 – 1685 New Plymouth Colony, Massachusetts Colony 1685 – 1776 Bristol County, Massachusetts Colony 1776 – Today: Bristol County, Massachusetts

en.lifeSummary: When Dea. William Carpenter was born on 22 November 1631, in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Carpenter, was 27 and his mother, Abigail Briant, was 27. He married Priscilla Bennett on 5 October 1651, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 January 1702, in Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dea. William Carpenter est né le 22 novembre 1631, à Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Carpenter, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Abigail Briant, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Priscilla Bennett le 5 octobre 1651, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1702, à Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dea. William Carpenter am 22. November 1631 in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Carpenter 27 und seine Mutter Abigail Briant 27. Er hat am 5. Oktober 1651 in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Priscilla Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Januar 1702 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dea. William Carpenter è nato il il 22 novembre 1631 nel Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Carpenter, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Abigail Briant, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Priscilla Bennett il 5 ottobre 1651, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1702, nel Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Dea. William Carpenterが1631年11月22日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアシャルボウルンで生まれた時，父William Carpenterは27歳，母Abigail Briantは27歳であった。1651年10月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスでPriscilla Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1702年1月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスプロヴィデンスニューマン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dea. William Carpenter(이)가 1631년 11월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 샤보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Carpenter(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Briant(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1651년 10월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 Priscilla Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1702년 1월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스 프로비데스 뉴먼 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dea. William Carpenter nasceu em 22 de novembro de 1631, em Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Carpenter, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Briant, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Priscilla Bennett em 5 de outubro de 1651, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1702, em Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dea. William Carpenter родился 22 ноября 1631 г. в местности шэлбурн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Carpenter было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Briant, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Priscilla Bennett 5 октября 1651 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 января 1702 г. в местности бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности нюман кеметири, провиденс, провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dea. William Carpenter nació el 22 de noviembre de 1631, en Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Carpenter, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Abigail Briant, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Priscilla Bennett el 5 de octubre de 1651, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de enero de 1702, en Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Newman Cemetery, Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
